meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Scale Your Freelance Projects Faster
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Learn how to use AI debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster, impress clients, and automate your workflow.
content.answer_block: To scale your freelance projects, stop manual debugging. Leverage AI agents like Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for rapid CLI-based refactoring. By integrating these tools into your CI/CD pipeline, you eliminate bottlenecks, reduce technical debt, and deliver production-ready code in half the time of manual development.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your client’s deadline is looming, and your codebase has become a tangled web of legacy technical debt. You aren't just coding anymore; you're drowning in manual fixes, and your ability to scale is hitting a hard, painful ceiling. It is the silent killer of freelance careers.

But the tide is turning. By shifting from manual investigation to AI-driven debugging, you reclaim your most valuable asset: time. This guide transforms you from a code-monkey into an AI-augmented architect, allowing you to ship complex features with the speed and precision of a senior engineering team.

steps.title: Contextualize the Bottleneck
steps.description: Identify the specific architectural friction point before applying fixes to ensure your AI agent understands the domain model.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify the top three files causing the highest latency and maintenance overhead.

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use AI to trace exceptions back to their origin, bypassing hours of stack trace analysis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Investigate the recent production logs and map the correlation between the database query spikes and the service layer logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze the error logs in ./logs and propose a fix for the memory leak'

steps.title: Refactoring for Scalability
steps.description: Transform bloated, non-scalable functions into modular, reusable patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current monolith controller into a clean service-repository pattern, ensuring type safety and testability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'refactor the auth controller to follow the repository pattern'

steps.title: Automated Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Ensure your fixes don't introduce regressions by generating high-coverage tests immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of Jest unit tests for the newly refactored service, covering edge cases and error states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests for the new service logic and run them'

steps.title: Verification and Deployment
steps.description: Perform a final automated sanity check and push the validated code to staging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Execute a final validation against the project requirements and summarize the performance improvements gained.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'verify all tests pass and prepare a summary report of changes'

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with your 'coding style guide' as a system prompt to ensure the generated code matches your project's existing patterns.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to keep track of project-wide variables that standard LLM chats often forget.
When debugging, ask the AI to explain the 'why' behind the fix to improve your own engineering intuition over time.
Chain Antigravity prompts with specific environment variables to simulate production behavior in your local dev setup.
Never blindly accept AI diffs; always request a 'review and summary' before committing to ensure you maintain complete architectural control.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI tools into your daily workflow by setting up a pre-commit hook that triggers an automated linting and AI-analysis check for every pull request.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your own code and start shipping products that scale effortlessly. You have the tools, the strategy, and the expertise to double your freelance output starting today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
